首页Home / 攻略Guides / 正文Article

异象委托 Anomaly Commission

影像幽宅解谜复盘：放映机顺序、顶层开门和书架蜘蛛无伤思路 Image Haunted House Puzzle Review: Projector Order, Top Floor Door and No-Hit Spider Tips

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-22 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：9 分钟Read time: 9 min

攻略速览

影像幽宅表面是解谜委托，实际考验的是玩家能否理解放映机对场景结构的影响。很多卡关来自把所有放映机都当成同一种机关。本文用选择逻辑重新梳理流程，帮助你不靠死记硬背也能完成任务。

前置条件与接取方式

推荐等级

猎人等级 28 级以上

任务位置

绘空町水梨子大道周边小巷

队伍建议

带破韧角色和稳定生存位

放映机选择逻辑

理解场景变化

1

入口机关开门

选择开启大门

入口放映机的作用是进入异象空间，不需要调整进度条。这里的目标只有一个：打开宅邸入口。

2

大厅机关修楼梯

播放影片并停在红色区间

大厅放映机会改变楼梯状态。红色区间代表关键帧，停对后才能获得通往二楼的路线。

3

二楼机关消墙

直接关闭

二楼中转点不是要播放，而是要关闭阻挡。很多玩家在这里反复拉进度条，反而无法前进。

4

里屋机关生成楼梯

播放影片并停红区

里屋机关再次使用关键帧逻辑，命中红区后场景会生成向上的简易楼梯。

5

顶层机关解锁BOSS房

先调查蓝光，再关闭放映机

顶层需要先触发调查点，再操作放映机。少做调查会导致机关状态看似正确但门不开。

BOSS处理

书架蜘蛛

书架蜘蛛的威胁主要来自红圈扑击和连续吐丝。只要不贪刀，先破韧再爆发，难度明显低于解谜部分。

  • 看到地面红圈立即横向闪避，不要向后直退。
  • 破韧技能留到 BOSS 停顿或转身后使用，减少空技能。
  • 爆发技能等僵直窗口再交，避免在移动阶段打空。

完成奖励

环石 养成材料 异象收容奖励 绘空町探索进度

影像幽宅的核心是区分播放、关闭和调查三种机关行为。记住每台放映机改变的是哪一段场景，就不会在宅邸里反复迷路。

完整解析

如果你只背顺序，影像幽宅下次遇到类似机关仍然容易卡。更好的方式是理解放映机类型：有些负责打开入口，有些负责切换场景关键帧，有些负责关闭阻挡，还有些需要先调查再操作。

大厅和里屋都需要把影片停在红色区间，因为它们改变的是场景结构。二楼中转放映机则相反，它的正确解法是关闭。这个反差是多数玩家卡关的根源。

顶层机关要特别注意蓝光调查点。很多玩家直接操作放映机，结果门没有反应，以为顺序错了。实际上是少了前置调查，导致机关没有进入可解锁状态。

BOSS 书架蜘蛛不难，但场地压迫感会让玩家急着输出。保持横向移动、观察红圈、等僵直再爆发，通常就能稳定通过。

Guide Snapshot

Image Haunted House looks like a puzzle commission, but it mainly tests whether you understand how each projector changes the space. Many failures come from treating every projector as the same device.

Requirements and Entry

Recommended level

Hunter level 28 or above

Location

Alleys around Suinarashi Avenue in Ekorai Town

Team advice

Bring toughness-break damage and a stable survival slot

Projector Logic

Understand what the scene change does

1

Entrance device opens the door

Choose Open Gate.

This projector only lets you enter the anomaly space. No timing bar is needed.

2

Hall device repairs stairs

Play the film and stop in the red zone.

The hall projector changes stair state. The red zone is the key frame for the route to the second floor.

3

Second-floor device removes a wall

Shut it off directly.

This node is not solved by playing the film. Repeatedly dragging the progress bar here prevents progress.

4

Inner-room device creates stairs

Play the film and stop in the red zone.

This uses the key-frame logic again and creates the temporary stairs upward.

5

Top-floor device unlocks the boss room

Investigate the blue light first, then shut off the projector.

Without the investigation trigger, the device can look correct while the door stays locked.

Boss Handling

Bookshelf Spider

The spider's danger comes from red-circle pounces and repeated web attacks. If you avoid greed, break toughness first and burst during stagger, it is easier than the puzzle.

  • When a red circle appears, dodge sideways rather than straight backward.
  • Use toughness-break skills after the boss pauses or turns, reducing missed skills.
  • Save burst skills for stagger windows instead of casting during movement.

Rewards

Annulith Growth materials Anomaly containment reward Ekorai exploration progress

The key is separating three actions: play, shut off and investigate. Once you know what each projector changes, the mansion stops feeling like a memory test.

Full Analysis

If you only memorize the sequence, similar devices will still cause trouble later. Understand projector types instead: entrance, key-frame scene change, blocker removal and investigation-gated unlock.

The hall and inner room both need the red zone because they alter the scene structure. The second-floor projector is the opposite: shutting it off removes the blocker.

The blue investigation point on the top floor is easy to miss. If the door does not react, the issue is often the missing investigation, not the projector order.

The boss is manageable if you keep moving sideways, respect red circles and burst after stagger rather than rushing damage.
